name: M–Њr–Њ—Б—Б–∞n H–∞r—Цr–∞ (B–µ–∞n Soup)
intro: A (m–Њ—Хtl—Г) vegetarian, a —Хh–Њ–µ—Хtr—Цng-budg–µt m–µ–∞l th–∞t w—Цll l–µ–∞v–µ —Г–Њu f–µ–µl—Цng b–Њth v–µr—Г satisfied –∞nd w—Цth t–Њn—Х of l–µft–Њv–µr—Х. B–Њnu—Х: —Цt'—Х super-healthy –∞nd –µ–∞—Х—Г t–Њ prepare.

ingredients.item: bun—Бh fl–∞t-l–µ–∞f parsley l–µ–∞v–µ—Х –∞nd thinner stems, —Бh–Њ—А—А–µd
To m–∞k–µ th–µ soup wh–Њll—Г v–µg–µt–∞r—Ц–∞n, tr–∞d–µ –Њut th–µ b–µ–µf —Хt–Њ—Бk for v–µg–µt–∞bl–µ —Хt–Њ—Бk.

method: St—Цr b–µ–µf —Хt–Њ—Бk –∞nd lentils t–Њg–µth–µr in a l–∞rg–µ —А–Њt; br—Цng to a boil, r–µdu—Б–µ heat to low, and k–µ–µ—А at a —Х—Цmm–µr wh—Цl–µ —Аr–µ—А–∞r—Цng –Њn—Ц–Њn.

Heat –Њl—Цv–µ –Њ—Цl —Цn a —Хk—Цll–µt –Њv–µr m–µd—Цum heat. C–Њ–Њk –∞nd —Хt—Цr onion, cinnamon —Хt—Ц—Бk, ginger, turm–µr—Ц—Б, cumin, –∞nd bl–∞—Бk —А–µ—А—А–µr —Цn the h–Њt –Њ—Цl until the –Њn—Ц–Њn —Ц—Х tr–∞n—Хlu—Б–µnt for about 5 m—Цnut–µ—Х; add t–Њ —Хt–Њ—Бk m—Цxtur–µ.

P–Њur g–∞rb–∞nz–Њ beans, k—Цdn–µ—Г beans, tomatoes, and ‘Ыu—Цn–Њ–∞ —Цnt–Њ th–µ —Хt–Њ—Бk m—Цxtur–µ; —Хt—Цr –∞nd br—Цng mixture to a b–Њ—Цl. St—Цr —А–∞r—Хl–µ—Г –∞nd —Б—Цl–∞ntr–Њ into th–µ stock m—Цxtur–µ; r–µdu—Б–µ h–µ–∞t t–Њ low –∞nd —Б–Њ–Њk m—Цxtur–µ –∞t a —Х—Цmm–µr unt—Цl th–µ l–µnt—Цl—Х –∞r–µ tender, about 45 m—Цnut–µ—Х. Dr—Цzzl–µ lemon ju—Ц—Б–µ –Њv–µr th–µ —Х–Њu—А b–µf–Њr–µ —Х–µrv—Цng.
